title: 24PCS Snowy Norfolk Pine Stems Frosted Tree Filler Branches Christmas Foliage Picks Greenery Decoraitons for Xmas Garland Wreath DIY Crafts Home Decor
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: You will receive 24 Pieces christmas norfolk pine branches, and each norfolk pine stems approx 35cm/13.7Inches. Vibrant, lush green color that adds a fresh and lively touch to any holiday decor.

REALISTIC DESIGN: Our frosted norfolk pine stems capture the essence of nature, featuring delicate foliage that mimics the look of real Norfolk Pine trees, and covered with artificial snow. fluffy and rich green appearance. Their wintry rustic appeal could be the perfect finishing touch for your handmade garland wreaths or swag.
UPGRADE MATERIAL: Our artificial christmas foliage stems are made of PE soft adhesive material, soft and stretchable, easy to bend, can be shaped according to your preference.

CREATIVE DIY FUN: The bright green color and beautiful appearance of these frosted Christmas artificial pine branches perfect for DIY projects. Pair them with other decorations like Christmas garland, wreaths and Christmas tree decor for stunning results.

VERSATILE DECORATIVE ELEMENT: These real touch norfolk pine stems are incredibly versatile and can be used in a variety of Christmas decorations. From wreaths and garlands to table centerpieces and mantel displays, can be easily shaped and arranged to suit your unique holiday style.
